itemReviewed.name: Barasat Indira Gandhi Memorial High School - Barasat

address.streetAddress: Indira Gandhi Memorial High School, 456, PK Guha Rd, Arabinda Sarani, Rajbari, Dum Dum, Kolkata, West Bengal 700028, India

itemListElement.reviewBody: Don't enroll your child , very ill-mannered staff are there , even principal and VC both are equally bad. School does not have any social activity. Only some students are invited who take tuition from class teachers or blue eyed people.  The owner of the school is not reachable over the phone or email , so avoid this school. The reception staff are pathetic , uncultured and not sure if well socially educated.

itemReviewed.name: Barasat Indira Gandhi Memorial High School - Barasat

itemListElement.reviewBody:
They're all leeches. That's how I'd describe my experience briefly. The lengths they'll go to squeeze money out of our parents' pockets is genuinely appalling. Their greediness makes me sick.

Firstly, they changed our house dress last year so everyone had to buy the new "authorised" dress (changing dress = money) but that's so typical right? But guess what? The color of our house dress pants are white!! So everyone will buy an extra pair ( buying extra pair = more money)
Secondly, you can't selectively buy books if you already have bought the ncert beforehand.
And honestly i could go on but lastly, they organise annual activitee (sports, carnivals etc) every year and compell us to pay them 500-1000 rupees. It's disgusting

itemReviewed.name: Barasat Indira Gandhi Memorial High School - Barasat

itemListElement.reviewBody: No value of a student.... Teachers are very rude no manners 👎🏻👎🏻👎🏻👎🏻👎🏻 i am an ex student i asked them for a doc of mine they replied very rudely saying "abhi nahi milega baad me aao tab kahan tha jab doc mil raha tha"and disconnected the call ..... And it is their job to provide these docs if someone needs it very bad 😞😞

itemReviewed.name: Barasat Indira Gandhi Memorial High School - Barasat

itemListElement.reviewBody: Worst school ever I have seen. Their is literally no school like this in kolkata. The students, principals, teachers everyone is rude and arrogant. They dont know how to behave with guardians. They also cut our attendance deliberately to harass us. The management of this school is the worst. Such a 3rd class shameless school. I recommend you to not admit your child in this school if you don't want to ruin their mental health as well as their future.

itemReviewed.name: Barasat Indira Gandhi Memorial High School - Barasat

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Experience is really not good. Behavior of staff is really bad. Front office staff is rude. Also as per policy they don't allow students if one day also someone is late by 10min but teachers can suspend class immediately when student is sitting to attend the class. Speaking rudely with parents infront of kids. I can understand if it is a repeat instance but we are human and dealing with kids so one day in a month it can happen due to unavoidable condition.

now a days all are interested to give good education to their children which is the reason of such behavior of few private schools. Never ever go for this school. They only speak when to give money and what will happen if we don't pay rest is as per their wish
